summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PlanMyLuxe luxury travel search/filter website. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend functionality working well with minor mobile interaction issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Some filter checkboxes not clickable in mobile modal overlay

passed_tests: Backend API health check (200 OK)
Filter options endpoint returns 22 destinations and 3 holiday types
Search endpoint returns 503 total hotels with pagination
Search by query 'greece' returns 93 filtered results
Search by destination 'greece' returns 28 filtered results
Search by 5-star rating returns 221 filtered results
Search by holiday type 'all-inclusive' returns 31 filtered results
Price range filtering (500-2000) returns 33 results
All sort options working (best, price_asc, price_desc, rating_desc, newest)
Pagination working (page 1 and page 2 with different page_size)
Combined filters working (greece + 5-star + price_min)
Homepage loads with hero banner, search bar, trending deals
Homepage search bar redirects to /search page with query parameter
Search page loads with proper filter sidebar and results
Desktop filter functionality working (rating, destination, sort)
Active filter tags display and can be removed
Clear all filters functionality working
URL state management working (filters reflected in URL)
Mobile responsive design working
Mobile filter panel opens and closes properly
Navbar and footer render correctly
Infinite scroll reaches end properly ('You've seen all X deals')

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (21/22 tests passed - 1 minor mobile interaction issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix mobile filter checkbox interaction issue in modal overlay. The mobile filter panel opens correctly but some filter checkboxes are not clickable due to potential z-index or event handling issues.
